violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling process to be 140F to 70F in 2 hours Then 70F to 41F in 4 Hours.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Large pots closest to the door in Walk in cooler have discard dates of 3/22/26 that have not been discarded.
Water Supply. — --Hot water generation was not sufficient to meet the peak demands throughout the food establishment. No hot water at time of inspection for Bathrooms or Handsinks.
Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on Rinse wand at 4-comp sink as required. Wand hangs below water level in sink.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
